title: rubus clethrocharis
intro: Rubus clethrocharis, also known as the European blackthorn or blackthorn, is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, the plant's roots, bark, and leaves have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus clethrocharis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in salves and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
